languages.text: "Однажды вы поймете, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Когда минут столетия жизни, и все принятые решения лягут тяжелым грузом на ваши плечи. Когда вы почувствуете себя пережитком прошлого, вспомните мои слова: иногда дряхлую ветвь следует отсечь, чтобы древо росло здоровым. Все ради династии, {name}".

traits.locale_text: "Однажды вы поймете, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Когда минут столетия жизни, и все принятые решения лягут тяжелым грузом на ваши плечи. Когда вы почувствуете себя пережитком прошлого, вспомните мои слова: иногда дряхлую ветвь следует отсечь, чтобы древо росло здоровым. Все ради династии, {name}".

languages.text: "You will understand someday, my heir. When centuries of your life have gone by, and every decision you ever made is a heavy burden upon your shoulders. When you begin to feel like a relic of the past, remember my words: sometimes a withered old branch should be pruned to keep the tree healthy. The dynasty before everything, {name}."
languages.original_text: "Однажды вы поймете, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Когда минут столетия жизни, и все принятые решения лягут тяжелым грузом на ваши плечи. Когда вы почувствуете себя пережитком прошлого, вспомните мои слова: иногда дряхлую ветвь следует отсечь, чтобы древо росло здоровым. Все ради династии, {name}".

traits.locale_text: "You will understand someday, my heir. When centuries of your life have gone by, and every decision you ever made is a heavy burden upon your shoulders. When you begin to feel like a relic of the past, remember my words: sometimes a withered old branch should be pruned to keep the tree healthy. The dynasty before everything, {name}."

"You will understand someday, my heir. When centuries of your life have gone by, and every decision you ever made will be a heavy burden upon your shoulders. When you begin to feel like a holdover from the past, remember my words: sometimes a withered old branch should be chopped off to keep the tree healthy. The dynasty before everything, {name}."

"You will understand someday, my heir. When centuries of your life have gone by, and every decision you ever made is a heavy burden upon your shoulders. When you begin to feel like a relic the past, remember my words: sometimes a withered old branch should be pruned to keep the tree healthy. The dynasty before everything, {name}."

When you begin to feel like a relic the past, remember my words: sometimes a withered old branch should be pruned to keep the tree healthy. The dynasty before everything, {name}."

"You will understand someday, my heir. When centuries of your life have gone by, and every decision you ever made is a heavy burden upon your shoulders. When you begin to feel like a relic of the past, remember my words: sometimes a withered old branch should be pruned to keep the tree healthy. The dynasty before everything, {name}."

languages.text: "Eines Tages werdet Ihr es verstehen, {mf|werter Erbe|werte Erbin}. Wenn Jahrhunderte Eures Lebens verstrichen sind und alle Entscheidungen, die Ihr jemals getroffen habt, schwer auf Euren Schultern lasten. Wenn Ihr Euch eines fernen Tages wie ein Relikt der Vergangenheit fühlt, denkt an meine Worte: Manchmal muss ein verwitterter alter Ast abgeschnitten werden, um den Baum gesund zu halten. Die Dynastie steht über allem, {name}."
languages.original_text: "You will understand someday, my heir. When centuries of your life have gone by, and every decision you ever made is a heavy burden upon your shoulders. When you begin to feel like a relic the past, remember my words: sometimes a withered old branch should be pruned to keep the tree healthy. The dynasty before everything, {name}."

traits.locale_text: "Eines Tages werdet Ihr es verstehen, {mf|werter Erbe|werte Erbin}. Wenn Jahrhunderte Eures Lebens verstrichen sind und alle Entscheidungen, die Ihr jemals getroffen habt, schwer auf Euren Schultern lasten. Wenn Ihr Euch eines fernen Tages wie ein Relikt der Vergangenheit fühlt, denkt an meine Worte: Manchmal muss ein verwitterter alter Ast abgeschnitten werden, um den Baum gesund zu halten. Die Dynastie steht über allem, {name}."

languages.text: « Mais vous le comprendrez un jour, mon {mf|héritier|héritière}. Quand vous aurez vécu plusieurs siècles, et que chacune de vos décisions pèsera un peu plus lourd sur vos épaules. Quand vous commencerez à vous sentir comme une relique du passé, rappelez-vous ces mots : il faut parfois accepter d'élaguer la branche affaiblie d'un arbre pour en préserver la vigueur. La dynastie passe avant tout, {name}. »
languages.original_text: "You will understand someday, my heir. When centuries of your life have gone by, and every decision you ever made is a heavy burden upon your shoulders. When you begin to feel like a relic the past, remember my words: sometimes a withered old branch should be pruned to keep the tree healthy. The dynasty before everything, {name}."

traits.locale_text: « Mais vous le comprendrez un jour, mon {mf|héritier|héritière}. Quand vous aurez vécu plusieurs siècles, et que chacune de vos décisions pèsera un peu plus lourd sur vos épaules. Quand vous commencerez à vous sentir comme une relique du passé, rappelez-vous ces mots : il faut parfois accepter d'élaguer la branche affaiblie d'un arbre pour en préserver la vigueur. La dynastie passe avant tout, {name}. »

languages.text: «Lo entenderá algún día, hereder{mf|o|a} mí{mf|o|a}, cuando haya vivido siglos y cada decisión que haya tomado sea una pesada carga sobre sus hombros. Cuando empiece a sentirse como una reliquia del pasado, recuerde mis palabras: a veces, es necesario podar una rama vieja y marchita para que el árbol siga sano. La dinastía ante todo, {name}».
languages.original_text: "You will understand someday, my heir. When centuries of your life have gone by, and every decision you ever made is a heavy burden upon your shoulders. When you begin to feel like a relic of the past, remember my words: sometimes a withered old branch should be pruned to keep the tree healthy. The dynasty before everything, {name}."

traits.locale_text: «Lo entenderá algún día, hereder{mf|o|a} mí{mf|o|a}, cuando haya vivido siglos y cada decisión que haya tomado sea una pesada carga sobre sus hombros. Cuando empiece a sentirse como una reliquia del pasado, recuerde mis palabras: a veces, es necesario podar una rama vieja y marchita para que el árbol siga sano. La dinastía ante todo, {name}».

languages.text: "Bir gün anlayacaksın vârisim. Hayatının yüzyılları akıp gittiğinde ve verdiğin her karar omuzlarında ağır birer yüke dönüştüğünde... Kendini geçmişin bir kalıntısı gibi hissetmeye başladığında sözlerimi hatırla. Bazen ağacı sağlıklı tutmak için solmuş yaşlı dallar budanmalıdır. Hanedanlık, her şeyden önce gelir {name}."
languages.original_text: "You will understand someday, my heir. When centuries of your life have gone by, and every decision you ever made is a heavy burden upon your shoulders. When you begin to feel like a relic the past, remember my words: sometimes a withered old branch should be pruned to keep the tree healthy. The dynasty before everything, {name}."

traits.locale_text: "Bir gün anlayacaksın vârisim. Hayatının yüzyılları akıp gittiğinde ve verdiğin her karar omuzlarında ağır birer yüke dönüştüğünde... Kendini geçmişin bir kalıntısı gibi hissetmeye başladığında sözlerimi hatırla. Bazen ağacı sağlıklı tutmak için solmuş yaşlı dallar budanmalıdır. Hanedanlık, her şeyden önce gelir {name}."

languages.text: “总有一天你会明白的，我的继承人。当数百年的岁月从你身边流过，你做过的每一个决定都如重担压在肩头。当你开始感觉自己像个旧日遗物时，请记住我的话：有时，为了树木的健康，应当修剪枯老的枝干。王朝高于一切，{name}。”
languages.original_text: "You will understand someday, my heir. When centuries of your life have gone by, and every decision you ever made is a heavy burden upon your shoulders. When you begin to feel like a relic of the past, remember my words: sometimes a withered old branch should be pruned to keep the tree healthy. The dynasty before everything, {name}."

traits.locale_text: “总有一天你会明白的，我的继承人。当数百年的岁月从你身边流过，你做过的每一个决定都如重担压在肩头。当你开始感觉自己像个旧日遗物时，请记住我的话：有时，为了树木的健康，应当修剪枯老的枝干。王朝高于一切，{name}。”

languages.text: 「いつかあなたは理解するだろう、私の後継者。あなたが生きてきた数世紀が過ぎ、あなたが今まで下したあらゆる決断が、あなたの肩に重くのしかかる時。あなたが過去の名残に感じられる時、私の言葉を覚えておいてほしい。時には枯れた枝を剪定して、樹木を健全に保つ必要がある。王朝よりも大切なもの、{名前}。」
languages.original_text: "You will understand someday, my heir. When centuries of your life have gone by, and every decision you ever made is a heavy burden upon your shoulders. When you begin to feel like a relic of the past, remember my words: sometimes a withered old branch should be pruned to keep the tree healthy. The dynasty before everything, {name}."

traits.locale_text: 「いつかあなたは理解するだろう、私の後継者。あなたが生きてきた数世紀が過ぎ、あなたが今まで下したあらゆる決断が、あなたの肩に重くのしかかる時。あなたが過去の名残に感じられる時、私の言葉を覚えておいてほしい。時には枯れた枝を剪定して、樹木を健全に保つ必要がある。王朝よりも大切なもの、{名前}。」
